reason: COMPLETED: Added automatic domain initialization. Modified createDomain and create mutations to schedule initializeDomainData action that fetches keywords and visibility from SE Ranking immediately after domain creation.
thinking_process: Implementation: (1) Added internalAction import, (2) Created initializeDomainData internal action, (3) Scheduled it in both domain creation mutations using ctx.scheduler.runAfter(0, ...), (4) Action fetches top 100 keywords by traffic and full visibility history, (5) Logs results to console and system logs. Deployed successfully at 16:59:22.
